title: englerodaphne ovalifolia
intro: Englerodaphne ovalifolia, also known as the Chinese Evergreen, is a species of plant in the family Ebenaceae. It is a tropical plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as aiding in the relief of pain and soreness. Englerodaphne ovalifolia is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
